arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Attacker 'catches eye' of European giants as £70.8m price tag set
arts.sum: Liverpool attacker Luis Diaz reportedly 'catches the attention' of Juventus amid uncertainty surrounding his future at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Man City suffer 'major' Erling Haaland injury scare eight days before Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Liverpool's Premier League rivals Manchester City have been left to worry over a new injury blow to Erling Haaland

arts.ttl: Liverpool to pay 'whatever it takes' for 18-year-old as Ibrahima Konate 'talks' revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keen admirers of Warren Zaire-Emery and may be prepared to spend 'whatever it takes' to sign the 18-year-old in the summer window.

arts.ttl: Tim Cahill says player Liverpool let go last year is the smartest footballer he’s seen
arts.sum: Tim Cahill has been building his perfect footballer made up of a number of attributes. The Australian was asked to build the greatest footballer of...

arts.ttl: Player that Liverpool are “long-term admirers” of will “probably” be sold for £60m
arts.sum: Liverpool’s manager, Arne Slot, would appear to be a long-term admirer of countryman, Xavi Simons, and is likely to be able to buy him for £60 this summer. arts.ttl: Liverpool looking to sign £33m-rated La Liga star on Man United radar
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United are keen on signing the Spanish defender Dani Vivian at the end of the season. The Athletic Club Bilbao defender has attracted the attention of top European clubs with his performances, and he could cost around €40 million (£33m) due to a release clause in his contract. arts.ttl: Everton, Liverpool and Slot charged after derby melee
arts.sum: Everton, Liverpool and Arne Slot are charged by the Football Association after incidents at the end of Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Liverpool plotting club-record move to sign ‘absolutely fantastic’ 25-year-old
arts.sum: Liverpool are plotting a blockbuster move to sign the Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak. The 25-year-old has established himself as one of the best strikers in the league since joining Newcastle and his performances have attracted the attention of top clubs. He has been linked with Arsenal in recent months and it appears that Liverpool […] The post Liverpool plotting club-record move to sign ‘absolutely fantastic’ 25-year-old appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'We are not going to stop' - Arteta fires title race warning to Liverpool
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has warned Liverpool that Arsenal are "not going to stop" fighting for the Premier League title after securing a late win against Leicester City, four days after Arne Slot's side dropped points to Everton.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends warning to Liverpool as Arsenal secret weapon downs Leicester
arts.sum: Arsenal cut the gap to Liverpool on Saturday as they just squeezed past Leicester at the King Power Stadium with the Premier League title race just about alive with 13 games of the season to go
